title: Khadijah: The Woman Allah Sent Salaam To

captions.tiktok: Allah sent this woman His own greetings of peace. The untold depth of Khadijah, may Allah be pleased with her.
captions.shorts: The woman Allah sent His salaam to, through the angel Jibril. This is Khadijah, may Allah be pleased with her.
captions.reels: Allah sent this woman His own greetings of peace. The untold depth of Khadijah, may Allah be pleased with her.

_note: Short-form VERTICAL (9:16, ~75s). Pillar: Wednesday (Surah/companions-adjacent seerah). Every claim shown on screen with its source (foot): Sahih al-Bukhari 3, 3818, 3820; Sahih Muslim 2432, 2435; Musnad Ahmad (hasan); seerah (Ibn Hisham). No depiction of the Prophet pbuh, Khadijah, or the family. One distinct clip per beat, no reuse (must differ from the Yusuf set). Render StoryVideo (orientation=vertical).

segments.text: There was a woman, so beloved to Allah, that He sent her His own greetings of peace... carried down by an angel. But to understand why... you have to go back, to the night that changed the world.
This is the story of Khadijah... may Allah be pleased with her.
segments.title: KHADIJAH
segments.titleSub: may Allah be pleased with her

segments.text: For years, high above Makkah, her husband would climb alone... to the cave of Hira. To sit in the silence... and search for his Lord.

Then one night... the angel Jibril came to him, and said a single word. Read. I cannot read, he answered. So the angel held him, and pressed him... until he could bear no more. Then let him go, and said again. Read.
Read... in the name of your Lord, who created. And with those words... the very first verse of the Qur'an, came down to the earth.
He ran down that mountain, trembling... his heart pounding. Cover me, he cried. Cover me. I fear for myself, he said.
And it was Khadijah, who held him... and calmed him. The first soul on earth, to believe him. Before any man... any woman... or child.
By Allah, she told him... Allah will never disgrace you. You keep the ties of family. You carry the weak. You honor your guest. You stand by the truth.

Then she took him, to her cousin Waraqah... an old man who knew the earlier scriptures. And Waraqah understood at once. This, he said... is the same angel that came to Musa. Your husband... is being made a prophet.
From that day, she poured her whole life into him. The richest woman in Makkah... gave her fortune away, until nothing was left. And she never once complained.

So one day, the angel Jibril descended, and said: when Khadijah comes... give her peace, from her Lord. And tell her... of a home in Paradise, made of hollowed pearl. Where there is no noise... and no sorrow, ever.

For twenty five years, he loved only her. And long after she was gone... he still honored her friends. Aisha, may Allah be pleased with her, said she was never jealous of anyone... the way she was of Khadijah. A woman she never even met.
She believed in me... when no one else did, he said. And Allah gave me children through her. That was Khadijah... may Allah be pleased with her.
